_note: Synthetic GitHub `pull_request` event payload for tests. Hand-authored to represent a focused, well-described fix from a returning contributor. Not captured from a real PR.

pull_request.title: Fix race condition in cache eviction when TTL is 0
pull_request.body:
Fixes #311.

When `ttl=0` the eviction timer was scheduled with a 0ms delay, which under load could fire before the entry was inserted, leaving a dangling key. This reorders insertion before timer scheduling and adds a regression test in `test/cache_ttl.test.js`.

Repro: run the new test against `main` — it fails ~30% of the time; passes deterministically with this change.

No public API change.
